title: Fix glossary: missing aria-label + broken related term links + pluralization bug
description:
There are THREE issues to fix in this file:

### Issue 1: Search input lacks aria-label
The glossary search input (id='search-input') has no aria-label and no associated <label>. Add aria-label="Search glossary terms" to the input element.

### Issue 2: Related terms link to non-existent anchors
Many glossary terms have 'Related Terms' links that reference anchors for terms not defined in the glossary (e.g., #telepathy, #precognition, #psychokinesis, #consciousness, #healing, #parapsychology, #publication-bias, #clairvoyance, etc.). Clicking these scrolls to the top of the page.

The actually defined terms are: Bayes Factor, DMILS, Double-Blind, Effect Size, File Drawer Problem, Ganzfeld, Meta-analysis, NDE, OBE, p-value, Pre-registration, Presentiment, Psi, Remote Viewing, Replication, RNG.

Fix: In the terms data array (the array of objects with term/definition/related properties), remove any related term entries that don't correspond to a defined term. Only keep related entries whose anchor (lowercased, hyphenated version of the term name) matches one of the 16 defined terms above.

### Issue 3: Section headers say '1 terms' instead of '1 term'
The letter section headers show '{count} terms' which produces '1 terms' for single-entry sections. Fix by using a ternary: `{count} {count === 1 ? 'term' : 'terms'}`.

Do NOT output any thinking or explanation. Output ONLY search/replace blocks.
